final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical step-by-step instructional diagram illustrating how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-illustration / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical step-by-step layout with clearly numbered steps 1, 2, 3, 4
Subject: must include all 4 steps in sequence:
  Step 1: docker environment setup / pulling the hermes image
  Step 2: running / configuring the hermes container
  Step 3: integrating glmcodingplan into the container
  Step 4: verification / deployment complete
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a technical / developer-tool direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" / "2" / "3" / "4" with corresponding step titles; must include "hermes" and "glmcodingplan" as verbatim labels on relevant steps
Constraints: must preserve clear visual separation between each numbered step; each step must include a small illustrative diagram or icon showing the action; step numbers must be prominently visible
Avoid: must avoid decorative clutter that obscures technical clarity
